title: Texas War of Independence
subject: Texas War of Independence
program_outcome: This syllabus explores the Texas War of Independence, from its causes to its impact on modern times.

classes.title: The Roots of Conflict
classes.summary: This class covers the political and social factors leading to the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Explain the key factors that led to tensions between Texas settlers and the Mexican government
enabling: Identify the role of the Mexican Constitution of 1824 in Texan discontent
Describe the impact of immigration policies on Texas settlers
Discuss the cultural and political differences between Texas settlers and the Mexican government

classes.title: The Early Stages of Rebellion
classes.summary: This class examines the initial conflicts and events that marked the beginning of the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Describe the events that marked the start of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify key events like the Battle of Gonzales
Explain the significance of the Consultation of 1835
Discuss the role of figures such as Stephen F. Austin in the early rebellion

classes.title: Major Battles and Turning Points
classes.summary: This class focuses on significant battles and turning points during the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Analyze the impact of major battles on the outcome of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Describe the significance of the Battle of the Alamo
Explain the outcomes of the Battle of San Jacinto
Discuss the strategic decisions made by Texan and Mexican leaders

classes.title: The Birth of the Republic of Texas
classes.summary: This class explores the formation of the Republic of Texas and its initial challenges.
terminal: Describe the establishment of the Republic of Texas and its early governance
enabling: Discuss the drafting and significance of the Texas Declaration of Independence
Identify the first leaders of the Republic of Texas and their roles
Explain the challenges faced by the new republic, such as recognition and border disputes

classes.title: Legacy and Modern Implications
classes.summary: This class examines the long-term effects of the Texas War of Independence on Texas and the United States.
terminal: Evaluate the lasting impacts of the Texas War of Independence on modern Texas and US relations
enabling: Discuss how the war influenced Texas's annexation to the United States
Analyze the cultural legacy of the war in modern Texan identity
Explore the historical memory and commemoration of the war in Texas today
